executives.name: Andrew Cormier
executives.background: Mr. Cormier has over 30 years of experience in project development and operations. He was previously Vice President, Project Development at Torex Gold Resources Inc.

executives.name: David Fleck
executives.background: Mr. Fleck is a seasoned executive with over 30 years of experience in the investment industry. He was formerly Co-CEO of BMO Capital Markets.

executives.name: Christine Barwell
executives.background: Ms. Barwell is the Vice President, Human Resources. She has over 20 years of experience in human resources management in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

executives.name: Greg Fisher
executives.background: Mr. Fisher was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2023. He joined the Company in 2010 and has held various senior financial roles, including Senior Vice President, Finance.

executives.name: Jamie Porter
executives.background: Mr. Porter was appointed Executive Vice-President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer in May 2023. Prior to joining Agnico Eagle, he served as Chief Financial Officer of Alamos Gold Inc. for 11 years.

executives.name: John McCluskey
executives.background: Mr. McCluskey is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Alamos Gold Inc. and has been a Director since February 2003. He was a co-founder of the Company. Previously, he was the President and CEO of Grayd Resource Corporation.

executives.name: Luc Guimond
executives.background: Mr. Guimond is the Chief Operating Officer. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry and joined Alamos in 2015 following the merger with AuRico Gold.

executives.name: Nils Engelstad
executives.background: Mr. Engelstad is the Vice President, General Counsel. Prior to joining Alamos, he was General Counsel at McEwen Mining Inc.

board_of_directors.name: David Fleck
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Fleck is a seasoned executive with over 30 years of experience in the investment industry. He was formerly Co-CEO of BMO Capital Markets.

board_of_directors.name: Elaine Ellingham
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Ellingham is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held senior positions with the Toronto Stock Exchange.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Murphy
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Murphy is the Chairman of the Board. He was previously a partner at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP where he served as the National Mining Leader in Canada.

board_of_directors.name: Shaun Usmar
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Usmar is the Founder and CEO of Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. and was previously CFO of Barrick Gold Corporation.
